attractions.name: Doddabetta Peak
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Botanical Garden
attractions.description: Sprawling 55-acre oasis in the Nilgiri Hills with diverse collection of over 1,000 plant species including rare and exotic varieties
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Toda Hamlet viewpoint
attractions.description: Offers stunning panoramic vistas of the Nilgiri Hills, lush green valleys, rolling meadows, distant mountain ranges and glimpse of traditional Toda settlements
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Pine Forest
attractions.description: Picturesque valley nestled amidst towering pine trees creating serene and enchanting atmosphere, popular spot for nature lovers and photographers
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Pykara Lake
attractions.description: Created by Pykara Dam, offers stunning views of surrounding mountains and forests with boating facilities
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Pykara Falls
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Tea Museum
attractions.description: Fascinating place to learn about history and production of tea in the Nilgiris region
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf

attractions.name: Rose Garden
attractions.description: Sprawling paradise for flower lovers with impressive collection of over 20,000 varieties of roses showcasing breathtaking array of colors and fragrances
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Mysore and Ooty.pdf
